programme.title: Auction Hunters: Voodoo Moola
programme.desc: Allen & Ton hit a storage auction in Louisiana's Capitol City and quickly find themselves in trouble with the law! The guys uncover a pair of racing lawnmowers and then stumble on an antique barber chair from the early 1900s!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Dead Aim
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face-off against an auction buyer with shady bidding tactics and even more questionable fashion sense. The guys find a custom-built monowheel & a rifle designed to ward off grave robbers in the early 19th century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Choo-Choo, Cha-Ching!
programme.desc: Ton and Allen get a surprise second chance after nearly getting shut out in the small town of Palmer. They uncover a motorized railroad maintenance car from the 1960's and a pre-WWI Japanese semi-automatic pistol.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Diesel Digs
programme.desc: The guys head to the industrial hub of LA to score some heavy machinery and unearth a 1981 Bobcat 743 Frontloader, one of the first powered by a diesel engine and a trench-defending WWI German Sturmtrupp helmet bashing mace.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Sis Ducks Out
programme.desc: Big Sis drops some bad news as the guys clash with Carolyn over a carnival unit at an auction in Long Beach. Ton and Allen unearth a Native American tomahawk, a dunk tank and a rare gun that can fire three shots at once.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Home on the Gun Range
programme.desc: Barely making it to an auction in Corona, CA, Allen and Ton buy an overstuffed unit and find an antique crossbow, a rare 10-gauge Winchester shotgun and a 1940s Kiss-o-Meter.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gold 'n' Gloves
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes toe-to-toe with Ton's evil twin! They find a medieval catapult designed for storming castles and Ton uncovers a hidden collection of gold bars worth thousands of dollars!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Strat'ed for Cash
programme.desc: On a limited budget in the historic L.A. neighborhood of West Adams, Allen and Ton still win three lockers and find a Maui Blue Fender Stratocaster and a 1930s Schwinn bike.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: Ton and Allen duke it out with a local thrift store gang at a Brooklyn storage auction. The guys discover a classic arcade redemption game and a mid-century water cannon designed to fight towering infernos!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Pucks for Bucks
programme.desc: The guys get stuck with a unit they didn't want and have to sort through trash to make their bottom line. They uncover glass blowing tools, autographed baseballs and a hockey puck launcher, which puts Ton in the line of fire.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Nothing But Net
programme.desc: Ton and Allen face their toughest challenge yet when two old rivals join forces. The guys dig up an off-road motorcycle and a pair of net guns, while the staff clashes with mystery shoppers back at Haff Ton Pawn.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: The kids return to Omashu so that Aang can learn Earthbending from King Bumi; however, when they get there, they are shocked to find the city is now in Fire Nation hands.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: When the kids end up in a mysterious and strange swamp, their fears are exposed. And Aang learns about being `connected to the Earth' from an unlikely teacher.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Aang and the gang discover an Earth town that celebrates `Avatar Day'. They learn that it is not a celebration of the Avatar, but a festival of anger for something Aang did in his past.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: In search for an Earthbending teacher for Aang, the kids go to an underground Earthbending tournament where they encounter Toph, a blind, but powerful Earthbender.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: Travelling without Uncle now, Zuko wanders alone into an Earth Kingdom town where he bonds with a local boy. Meanwhile, Zuko is haunted by memories of his own youth.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: As the kids are pursued relentlessly by a mysterious machine, their exhaustion puts them at each other's throats.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: When Aang struggles with a block while trying to learn Earthbending from Toph, he wonders if the problem is with him or his teacher. Meanwhile, Sokka gets himself in a jam.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: A professor leads the kids to a spirit library in the middle of the desert, where Sokka hopes to discover powerful secrets to use against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: Aang searches for Appa, while Katara struggles to keep everyone together so they can survive in the vast desert. Meanwhile, Uncle and Zuko seek help from an ancient secret society.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: When the kids can't take the easy way into Ba Sing Se, they must escort a family of refugees there the hard way, through the deadly Serpent's Pass.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Freeland
programme.desc: Katie Freeland hopes to fund a family safari in Africa.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Humphreys
programme.desc: In Wrexham a mother and daughter who want to raise funds to surprise a family member.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Perry
programme.desc: Two daughters aim to raise funds for a school in memory of her mother.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Mills
programme.desc: Diane Mills's collectibles include signed memorabilia from Sir Laurence Olivier.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Ingles
programme.desc: Fiona Inglis, mother of Duncan James, wants help to raise money for a special trip.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Mead
programme.desc: Alison Mead wants to raise funds to take her children to New York for a dream holiday.

programme.desc: A guest who has a huge drive and work ethics and has overcome some hurdles that have possibly made him stronger. His entrances make Harry Styles look underdressed at Coachella.

programme.title: Next Goal Wins
programme.desc: With the 2014 World Cup fast approaching, Dutch football coach Thomas Rongen is hired to lead the famously pitiful national team of American Samoa. But despite the odds, can Rongen pave the way to the island’s first ever victory on the world stage?

programme.title: Benny & Joon
programme.desc: Johnny Depp and Mary Stuart Masterson star in this quirky romantic drama about two misfits who come together as a result of an unusual poker game. Aidan Quinn and Julianne Moore co-star.

programme.title: Lost In London
programme.desc: A first-of-its-kind film event which was filmed and screened live simultaneously in select cinemas around the world. The film is loosely based on Woody Harrelson's tabloid-worthy crazy London night-out resulting in him getting in trouble with the law.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic - Part 2
programme.desc: Fresh off his second place finish at Bellagio earlier in the season, Faraz The Toilet Jaka is back in Las Vegas and determined to not come up short once again.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Southern Poker Championship - Part 1
programme.desc: A bunch of good ol' boys from down south and one New York City lawyer tangle in a high stakes poker match on the banks of the Mississippi.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Southern Poker Championship - Part 2
programme.desc: The action heats up down South as the Alabama Cowboy Hoyt Corkins looks to write his name in the record books by notching his second career WPT title.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT L.A. Poker Classic - Part 1
programme.desc: In Los Angeles money means power and there is plenty of power up for grabs at the final table of the Los Angeles Poker Classic as first and second place both earn over $1,000,000.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Invitational - Part 1
programme.desc: The beautiful reality television star Trishelle Cannatella brightens up this Invitational poker party but her opponents know her beauty comes with brains and more than a little gamble.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Invitational - Part 2
programme.desc: The WPT Invitational has come down to just four players and beautiful reality TV show star Trishelle Cannatella is ready to douse her opponents with a little reality of her own.

programme.title: The 39 Steps
programme.desc: A man in London tries to help a counter-espionage Agent. But when the Agent is killed, and the man stands accused, he must go on the run to save himself and stop a spy ring that is trying to steal top-secret information.

programme.title: Cyrano De Bergerac
programme.desc: The charismatic swordsman-poet helps another woo the woman he loves in this straightforward version of the play.

programme.title: Love and Death: Love and Death
programme.desc: Woody Allen invades the spirit of Tolstoy in this hilarious spoof of 18th Century Russia, when Napoleon is preoccupied with perfecting his pastry and before Wellington markets his beef.

programme.title: The Big Fight
programme.desc: Tien Peng and Cheung Ching-ching play the leaders of a rebel group of Chinese kung fu fighters in a Japanese occupied town at the height of the war.

programme.title: 6 Below

programme.title: Jeff Dunham's The Cars That Drove Us

programme.title: Jeff Dunham's The Cars That Drove Us
programme.desc: The Trans Am pushed muscle cars to the limit, becoming a hero of film (Smokey and the Bandit) and television (Knight Rider). But in chasing greatness, did PonGac push too far?

programme.title: Jeff Dunham's The Cars That Drove Us
programme.desc: Acer just two years, GM was ready to kill the CorveKe. But a rogue group of engineers defied orders, working in secret on what would become America’s Sports Car.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham's The Cars That Drove Us
programme.desc: Every car line has an iconic year — the ’57 Chevy, the ’69 Camaro, and of course the ’89 Batmobile, a revoluGonary model inspired by — and nearly destroyed by — Tim Burton.

programme.title: Pina
programme.desc: A tribute to the late German choreographer Pina Bausch, as her dancers perform her most famous creations.

programme.title: Ice and the Sky
programme.desc: A chronicle of the professional and emotional journey of scientist Claude Lorius, who left in 1957 to study the Antarctic ice and is regarded as the first person to discover global warming and prove its existence.

programme.title: Faces Places
programme.desc: Director Agnes Varda and photographer/muralist J.R. journey through rural France and form an unlikely friendship.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Mr. Right
programme.desc: Sydney runs into her ex Gray and goes on a holiday with him to Bali, but when Derek Lloyd shows up to enlist her to find Parvati's Bowl, she can't resist.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Sydney at Ten
programme.desc: Sydney's roommate from school is on track of a pendant from her past and enlists Sydney to help find it and catch the killer.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Light of Truth
programme.desc: Arabia 843 AD: A sheik uses the Light of Truth to reveal his general as a traitor. 2001: Prince Shareem drops out from Sydney's class to go search for the Light of Truth.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Treasure Island
programme.desc: Sydney's on the hunt for a Pirate's booty, but will a traitor force her to walk the plank?

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Women Want to Know
programme.desc: Sydney has found a temple with an idol of Ganesha and it is being filmed for TV, but they get trapped inside when the local rebels stumble onto them. Can Nigel and Karen help from USA?

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Star of Nadir
programme.desc: An anonymous Sultan's wife Danielle dies in mysterious circumstances in the desert. However, she had called for Sydney to help. Sydney believes Danielle was searching for the Star of Nadir.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The youthful King kidnaps Tripitaka, desperate to outshine his father, the King of Ox. Monkey’s powers fail, Pigsy and Sandy are distracted—who will save their master from the fiery-tempered King of Youth?

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Monkey kills disguised demons, but Tripitaka, thinking they were humans, banishes him. When the truth emerges, Tripitaka is endangered, regretting his mistrust of Monkey and disbelief in the demons’ existence.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The pilgrims find a village cursed with drought by a water monster who demands boy sacrifices. With Monkey’s cloud useless, brave Pigsy volunteers to give his life to save the people.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Monkey saves a widow, but Pigsy falls in love while she desires Tripitaka. Staying behind, Pigsy’s piggish ways surface. When Monkey returns, Tripitaka and Sandy are already in trouble with the Snake Demon.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Monkey hunts bandits for Lord Li, but discovers they’re not what they seem. Meanwhile, at an inn owned by a wicked dog-woman, Tripitaka faces a dangerous surprise.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Tripitaka dreams of a slain king whose throne was stolen by a Taoist imposter. With the prince’s help, the pilgrims set out to reveal the false king and restore the rightful ruler.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A woman (Elizabeth Ashley) who hit Ironside's van suffers from an embedded bullet that shifted position.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Brown, handcuffed to a prisoner (Andy Robinson), disappears after his plane is forced down in Reno.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside and a small-town doctor (Desi Arnaz) investigate a young man's death on a private plane; guest Patricia Smith.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A new police chief (Barry Atwater) and chief of detectives (Jessica Walter) are named during a major drug investigation.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Circumstantial evidence in a cattle-rustling operation points to a rebellious, young parolee; guests Bill Williams, William Katt.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A racetrack security chief (Gene Evans) asks Ironside to uncover the culprit behind a major robbery at the track; guest James Gregory.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Post Partum
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) becomes involved in a case where a West Point cadet is charged with possession of cocaine and is refusing to help himself due to his honor code. Meanwhile, Lacey's (Tyne Daly) father pays her a visit after a 30-year absence.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Man Who Shot Trotsky
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) receive a second opportunity to nail a notorious narcotics dealer as Petrie (Carl Lumbly) and Isbecki (Martin Kove) go 'off-Broadway' to pursue a murder case. Also starring Al Waxman as Lt. Bert Samuels.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Exit Stage Center (S04E19)
programme.desc: When a famous actress dies, the first assumption is suicide. However, as Cagney and Lacey investigate, they soon discover that she was murdered and everyone in the cast and crew of the play she was in has a probable motive for killing her.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Capitalism
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) investigate the murder of a prominent and well-respected Cambodian immigrant lawyer and discover his business might not be as it appears. Also starring Al Waxman as Lt. Bert Samuels.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Extradition
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) are sent to Los Angeles to extradite an old 'perp' as Cagney meets her brother Brian's (guest star David Ackroyd) family for the first time in 12 years. Also starring Al Waxman as Lt. Bert Samuels.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While marriage is meant to be for life, it often ends in divorce. These wives took their marriages vow seriously: "till death do us part."

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women burn madly with jealousy, an anger so deep they’ll kill to satisfy it. What makes them turn from “green with envy” to “lethal with jealousy?" Find out as we explore their hearts of darkness.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love Gone Wrong
programme.desc: Love can be beautiful, love can be blind and love can be deadly. Desire and jealousy are powerful forces driving women to dark and horrifying places in their minds.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The path towards revenge can sometimes lead to murder. It can be quick, fiery and violent. It can also be a dish served cold, the product of a calm, calculated plot.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Obsession
programme.desc: Deciphering what causes minds to corkscrew out of control is the complex work of the criminal profiler. Obsessions can take many forms: beauty, devotion, ego and power.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Obsession
programme.desc: Power is a responsibility as well as a privilege. But in the wrong hands, power can corrupt. For former Deputy Attorney General for the State of Delaware, losing sight of his sworn oath to uphold justice could prove lethal.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Backstage Murder
programme.desc: In the 1980's, two partners created a nightclub that would bring them wealth and international fame. The male strip club phenomenon promised female patrons fun and excitement. But the bright lights hid a dark side.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Lost Boys
programme.desc: In June of 1997, a crime wave swept Iowa like a tornado. It left a trail of robbery, kidnapping, and murder in its wake, and then it moved on. No one knew where.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Millionaire Murder
programme.desc: A businessman went to Florida to make one last deal before he retired-he never returned home to his millions. Authorities examined who was closest to him and who stood to gain from his disappearance. But this time conventional rules didn't apply.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cat and Mouse
programme.desc: He was a predator, abducting girls and young women from their own front yards in broad daylight. He was a sadist: phoning one victim's family, taunting them, boosting then dashing their hope, and he wouldn't stop until we stopped him.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: Nathaniel Bar-Jonah, a paedophile, is convicted in 2002 for multiple crimes but not for the 1996 disappearance of Zachary Ramsay. Zachary’s body is never found, and Bar-Jonah dies in prison in 2008.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: House of Horrors
programme.desc: The body of a woman is found floating next to a dock. The case takes the detectives into a sinister world from which few come out unharmed.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime
programme.desc: After finding the body of a young girl in a stream located in the suburbs of Montreal, investigators strive to retrace a murderer who knew how to use water to his advantage.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: On October 1, 2000, 10-year-old Heather Thomas disappeared from her father’s Cloverdale townhouse. Ertmoed is arrested and confesses that he lured Heather into his apartment on the pretext of showing her pictures of birds and strangles her to death.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Mortal Passion
programme.desc: In early April 2000, two students discover the lifeless body of a young woman on the edge of a river. The victim has wounds on her neck, but a murder weapon is not found at the scene. Investigators find a piece of paper in the victim’s pant pocket.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Mr. Big
programme.desc: On the evening of April 21, 2002, six weeks after being assaulted by her boyfriend Michael Bridges, and despite a restraining order against him, Erin Chorney is seen getting into a Ford Taurus known to belong to Bridges’ mother.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Invisible Death
programme.desc: Poison is an almost invisible form of death, and toxicologists must look for hidden clues in blood and tissue to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Web of Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Entomology: Bugs have roamed the earth for 250 million years, but their intimate association with death is just now coming to life.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Mind Hunters
programme.desc: Psychological Profiling: Journey into the dark recesses and calculated madness present only in our worst nightmares, and in the minds of serial killers.

programme.title: The New Detectives: In The Line of Fire
programme.desc: Bombers, snipers, spree killers: some people don't care who they kill, they just want to hurt innocent people.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Coroner's Casebook
programme.desc: A good coroner provides what's necessary to solve a crime. A bad one can spoil an otherwise rock-solid case. Cyril Wecht and Henry Lee, two of the country's most respected coroners, share their cases and insights into crime solving.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Chance Encounter
programme.desc: When firefighters find Victor Woods stabbed to death in his burning apartment, homicide detective Joe Kenda tracks Colorado's most notorious serial killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bad Moon Rising
programme.desc: Night before Halloween, a real-life nightmare unfolds when a young man is found clinging to life. The case takes a dark turn when Lt. Joe Kenda learns there is a second victim somewhere in the woods.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Snitch
programme.desc: When officers respond to a shooting , they discover the body of a young man they know all to well -- police informant Jimmie Stevenson. it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine who pulled the trigger.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda and his team investigate the scene of an apparent suicide, only to be forced to flee when they discover the house is booby-trapped.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: With Friends Like This
programme.desc: A young man is found gunned down outside his home . Sgt. Joe Kenda and Det. John Anderson must determine whether the killer was a complete stranger, a barrio gang member, or a jealous lover.

programme.title: Kevin Spencer
programme.desc: Kevin is put into adult prison and is forced to attend three psychiatric sessions a week.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Heather keeps leading Jon on, while only wanting Garfield for herself.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Penelope is back singing why she loves Garfield. Aloyisius Pig is back trying to cut the budget of the show.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Myron the Mouse tries to goad Garfield into chasing him. Edward R. Furrow is back psychoanalyzing the weasel and Orson.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield sits on Jon’s book and refuses to get up. Garfield thwarts a bank robbery.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Jon’s niece has to be retrieved by Garfield and Odie. Garfield gets confidence from a motivational speaker.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Irwin the Mouse wants to be cast and Garfield lets him be one. Wade visits the Sage on a mountain to see how to overcome his fears.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: The ancestor of one of the most hungry pirates sets sail. Philo is back to help give motivational speeches to the weasel and Wade.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield and Jon try to help out a sultan. Orson’s imagination takes Wade and Roy on an out-of-this-world experience.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Jon’s new next-door neighbor is a cat hater and Garfield has to find out why. All of the farmyards are caught in a repeating cycle of zany bits.

programme.title: On the Case: Murder Ordained?
programme.desc: When a young minister's wife is found dead, it appears to be a tragic accident. But then, another member of the congregation is murdered. Police begin to wonder if its just a coincidence or a calculated plot.

programme.title: On the Case: A Ray of Darkness
programme.desc: Police must connect two vicious murders in order to bring a single killer to justice.

programme.title: On the Case: Pattern of Violence
programme.desc: A 22 year old real estate agent is discovered strangled to death inside a model home she was trying to sell.

programme.title: On the Case: Cry on My Shoulder
programme.desc: When a young woman disappears, police zero in on her violent ex-boyfriend. But the secret to solving the case is buried in a cold case file.

programme.title: On the Case: A Window to Murder
programme.desc: A valiant teenager's dying act helps police solve the mystery behind her murder

programme.title: On the Case: Hidden by Fire
programme.desc: When firefighters respond to a raging house fire they discover the blaze was just the cover up for a vicious murder.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Clare Wood
programme.desc: In April 2007, Clare Wood met George Appleton on a dating website and they embarked on a relationship together. Unbeknownst to her, Appleton was a criminal with a severe history of violence against women.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Rochdale Groomers
programme.desc: Rochdale Groomers: Documentary examining the sex abuse scandal which occurred in the North of England and appeared to go undetected for quite some time.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Peter Sutcliffe
programme.desc: Arguably Britain's most infamous serial killer, Peter Sutcliffe became known as The Yorkshire Ripper when he began murdering women in Yorkshire during the 1970s.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Keith Blakelock
programme.desc: In 1985, PC Keith Blakelock was murdered during a riot on a housing estate in London, triggered after a black woman died of heart failure during a house search. Nobody has been brought to justice for his murder, despite three investigations.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Stephanie Slater
programme.desc: Estate agent Stephanie Slater reveals the story of her abduction, rape and incarceration, which occurred in 1992 whilst showing a man around a house.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me
programme.desc: Changes started subtly for twins Addi and Cassi, but after medical testing it was discovered they had a strange, genetic disease that causes progressive neurological deterioration.

programme.title: My Misdiagnosis
programme.desc: Ted is diagnosed with Carpal Tunnel Syndrome, but his pain spreads, leaving doctors baffled. Tammy is misdiagnosed with Lupus. Her last hope is that a biopsy will reveal her real diagnosis.

programme.title: My Misdiagnosis
programme.desc: Samantha has abdominal pains that make it difficult to function. Laura injures her shoulder in a workplace accident and is told that she is too young for the surgery needed to make her better.

programme.title: My Misdiagnosis
programme.desc: Krystal's aches and pains are misdiagnosed due to her young age. Rebecca's diagnosis of anxiety and depression sends her down a life-threatening path.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Rains Down
programme.desc: Restaurant worker Sharon Coleman is murdered in a hail of large caliber gunfire. Kenda must break through a web of lies to hunt down one of the most dangerous criminal masterminds he’s ever faced.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: London Calling
programme.desc: Oscar is forced to choose between his romantic plans with Charlotte (Teri Hatcher) and helping to save Felix's relationship as Emily decides to extend her stay in London.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Food Fight
programme.desc: When Oscar learns that his favorite hangout, Langford's, is in financial trouble, he impulsively asks Felix to help save it, without considering the disastrous consequences.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: I Kid, You Not
programme.desc: Oscar tries to prove to Charlotte that he can be responsible when he volunteers to take her son, Evan (Caleb Brown), trick-or-treating on Halloween.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Taffy Days
programme.desc: Oscar reconnects with many significant people from his father's life when he agrees to carry out Walter's last request to spread his ashes behind the candy factory he once owned.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Miss England
programme.desc: Dani's excitement at being promoted is cut short when Oscar tasks her with the daunting job of hiring her own replacement.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Eisen Trouble
programme.desc: Oscar tries to outsmart his nemesis, Rich Eisen, after he is forced to present him with a humanitarian award.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Odd Couples
programme.desc: Oscar and Felix seek the advice of a counselor in their apartment building to help overcome their issues.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Felix Navidad
programme.desc: When Felix learns that his perfectionist mother Meredith (Jessica Walter) cannot host Christmas this year, he goes into a frenzy as he prepares to take over the Unger family Christmas traditions.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: My Best Friend's Girl
programme.desc: To avoid a night of boredom, Oscar suggests that Charlotte (Teri Hatcher) take Felix out on their artsy cultural dates in his place.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Should She Stay or Should She Go?
programme.desc: Felix meets a fun-loving woman, Natasha (Busy Phillips), in a bar and takes her home for what is meant to be a one-night stand.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: Emily Kaye was not aware of the past dealings of the handsome Patrick Mahon when she fell head over heels in love with him. Mahon rented a bungalow under an assumed name, murdered her there and dismembered her body.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: Paul Teed murdered three of his family members in a nightclub over a dispute over money. He then fled back to his home in Bradford, believing he had the perfect alibi.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: Sidney Fox swindled unmarried women and cashed stolen cheques while travelling the country. This eventually led to murder with the intention of claiming the victim's life insurance.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: On Valentine's Day Paul Dyson strangled his partner Joanne Nelson to death before removing her body and making it look like she had just disappeared.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: After Andre Genestin's wife discovered he had been cheating on her, he murdered her and stored her body in a car roof box in the garden.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Stephen Klenczar – Bogus Barrister
programme.desc: Obsessed with boys toys, he posed as a barrister and claimed he worked for the British Government secret service.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Emma Golightly – Lonely Hearts Con Woman
programme.desc: Golightly conned tens of thousands of dollars from men she found in lonely hearts columns and dating sites.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Juan Carlos Guzman-Betancourt – Globe-trotting Trickster
programme.desc: In 1993, a young boy made the headlines when he was found as a stowaway on a plane which had arrived in Miami.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Lone Wolf
programme.desc: Two murders of mothers in their own homes send shock-waves through a normally quiet and friendly town where everybody leaves their doors unlocked. The crimes go unsolved until twenty-eight years later.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Double Cross
programme.desc: The investigation of the murder of a shady Montreal businessman takes detectives into the lurid underworld of drug dealers, con men, and crooked lawyers.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Bitter Truth
programme.desc: When the curiosity of an insurance claims investigator is piqued by the suspicious circumstances surrounding the death of a young Sikh man, a trail of bigamy, deceit and murder is soon uncovered.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Hustler
programme.desc: Three people meet - the son of a wealthy Frenchman, a Vancouver businessman looking for investors. Unbeknownst to two of them, they are the latest victims of a notorious international con man.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Sweet Killer
programme.desc: An aging hippy is going through bad times. When he's found dead in his home with a gut of antifreeze, it's a closed case. Then a shocking confession reveals a maelstrom of lies and a story of cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: The Case: Alone Against All Odds (Philippe Savelli)
programme.desc: In the 1980s, a paedophile rapist had been on the loose for five years in the Grenoble conurbation, in the troubled neighbourhood of La Villeneuve.

programme.title: The Case: A French Cold Case
programme.desc: The murder of 16-year-old schoolgirl Christelle Maillery, committed at Le Creusot in 1986.

programme.title: The Case: Murder at the Boarding School
programme.desc: In November 2011 Agnès Marin, 13, vanishes from her boarding school in the Cévennes.

programme.title: The Case: The Stone Cutter (Daniel Roussette)
programme.desc: It all began with the discovery of the body of an old lady in the forest at Pacy-sur-Eure by hunters.

programme.title: The Case: The Perpignan Station Murders
programme.desc: From 1995, a series of rapes, followed by murders shook the region of Perpignan.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Decades after the 1982 killing of Christina Castiglione, investigative genetic genealogy unmasks the predator responsible for her rape and murder in Redford Township, Michigan.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: The 1972 rape and murder of nine-year-old Debbie Lynn Randall, who was abducted not far from her home in Marietta, Georgia, is solved five decades later with the help of forensic science.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In Michigan, 1996, a body is found on the side of a road, wrapped in a blanket. The victim is Sharon Hammack. Detectives use new technology in an attempt to solve this cold case.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: When a young woman is out for a run she is brutally attacked and raped by a stranger. Police use groundbreaking genetic genealogy to identify the perpetrator.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Salt Lake City, 2010, Sherry Black is found stabbed to death in her bookshop. Police fail to identify her killer until advanced DNA science reignites the case.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry buys a video recorder, but disaster strikes when he offers to record a programme for the company chairman.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: To June's despair, Terry has become a wine-making enthusiast. She persuades him that a visit to Boulogne for some duty-free would be more enjoyable.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry and June decide to take a cheap wine-buying trip to Boulogne. June gets in a pickle when Terry misses the ferry, and a salvo of smelly cheeses dispatches a pedantic car park attendant.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: In an attempt to improve relations with their neighbours, June persuades Terry to spend a day with them at a wildlife sanctuary.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry and June experience problems with 'industrial relations' when they have new wardrobes fitted in their bedroom.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: While on a train journey, Terry manages to knock himself unconscious helping a lady retrieve her luggage.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: The chance of a bargain second-hand camera re-kindles Terry's interest in photography, but when he takes a portrait of his boss, it's up to June to extricate him from a sticky situation.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: June discovers that the diamond in her engagement ring is missing, and when Terry goes on a treasure hunt he comes up against inedible rock cakes, a reluctant pig and a disbelieving policeman.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: When the body of a child is found, Boston State Police have no leads, but with the help of the National Centre for Missing and Exploited Children, a trace is found.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Tracie Andrews purportedly witnessed the murder of her boyfriend, Lee Harvey, in a country lane on the night of 1st December 1996; but all was not what it seemed.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: David Jackson left his home to buy beer and cigarettes. He was never seen again. For 15 years his disappearance remained unsolved, until one investigator broke the case wide open.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Rachel O'Reilly was savagely murdered in her home, in what looked like a burglary gone wrong. A ground-breaking investigation finally put her killer behind bars.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: A killer, who stalked and gained his victim's trust, enticed her to her death. Almost two decades later scientific advances brought the perpetrator to justice.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mindy, Mindy, Mindy

programme.title: Dynasty: The Baby

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Antwane & Tony
programme.desc: Nev and Max are contacted by Carmen who is sounding the alarm on behalf of her cousin, Antwane. He's been in a three-year romance with a man named Tony that he met on a telephone chat line.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Antoinette & Albert
programme.desc: A year after meeting 'T-lights' on Instagram, 'instaceleb' Antoinette is ready to meet him, but he always brushes off the idea. Is he really the online celebrity he claims to be?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Lucille & Kidd Cole
programme.desc: Lucille led a simple life until she was asked to work for music producer Kidd Cole. Companies were never paid and one day Kidd couldn't be found. Will she get the answers she needs?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Tracie & Sammie

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: John & Kelsey
programme.desc: John is ready to leave Detroit but one thing holds him back: Kelsey. The two have never spoken outside of online chats but John is sure she's the one. Can he include Kelsey in his plans?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Solana & Elijah
programme.desc: Solana is in a relationship with Danny but can't stop thinking about her online love Elijah. His photos were used in so many profiles that she has to know is this the real Elijah?

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Falcon (Part 3)

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Chico

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Gitano

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Phantoms

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.desc: Hurricanes, Typhoons and Cyclones all the same thing with different names – what they also have in common is their destructive power! Hurricanes are large, swirling storms and winds from a hurricane can damage buildings or trees.

programme.title: Naked Science: Great Lakes
programme.desc: The Great Lakes are sometimes referred to as inland seas; they are the largest freshwater system in the world. Naked Science examines the early history of these amazing bodies

programme.title: Naked Science: Super Flares - Could They Cause Mass Extinction?
programme.desc: Superflares are amongst the greatest events of the Universe. These magnetic explosions can release energy millions of times greater than atomic bombs. They produce streams of highly energetic particles which can be highly destructive to life.

programme.title: Naked Science: Snowball Earth
programme.desc: There is a theory that scientists once dismissed as absurd - that long ago the Earth became so cold every inch of it was entombed in ice.

programme.title: scienceNOW: Can I Eat That?
programme.desc: What are the scientific secrets behind your favorite foods? David Pogue ventures into labs and kitchens to uncover the hidden truths behind the flavors and textures we take for granted every day.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Hubble's Renaissance
programme.desc: Before we can reach space, we must first be able to see it. Hundreds of years ago, the simple telescope was used to give us a seemingly closer vantage. Today, we use the awe-inspiring, and super powerful, Hubble Space Telescope.

programme.title: RISING TIDES
programme.desc: The next generation of Earth observation satellites are now in place maintaining the continuity of long-term climate data, in particular the planets rising temperatures and related ocean levels.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Fermi Paradox
programme.desc: The Fermi Paradox asks the ultimate question: Given a few reasonable assumptions about the chance of life arising elsewhere in the universe and the distance between the stars, why has an alien civilization not presented itself?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Vesta Unveiled
programme.desc: With the Dawn missions exploration of the asteroid Vesta and the dwarf planet Ceres, asteroids are a hot topic. See what these incredible missions have uncovered.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Where Are All the Aliens?
programme.desc: We’re looking hard, but the numbers aren’t stacking up, is life on other planets that hard to find? Even signals from an advanced race elude us.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Big Bang
programme.desc: Throughout history, our nightly view of the universe has fueled our collective imagination. When it comes to the Big Bang, not even the most creative work of imagination can rival what science has revealed about the birth of the universe.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Tickets Please
programme.desc: No spacecraft have traveled so fast or so close to a star before. It is hoped to reveal the source of the solar winds that effect us here on Earth

programme.title: The New Frontier: Shore To Shore
programme.desc: Our seafaring nature has translated well to the space age, seeking to sail out into the unknown in search of riches of one kind or another.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rainbow
programme.desc: In the world of astronomy, how do we overcome the limits imposed by our own eyesight? The universe comes alive by viewing the cosmos in infrared light to gamma radiation.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 7: The Milky Way
programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Jungle Planet
programme.desc: The Madagascan rainforest is one of the strangest in the world. It is inhabited by lemurs whose howls at dawn and dusk fill the woodland.

programme.title: Wild Baltic Sea: Between Denmark and Latvia
programme.desc: From Denmark’s northernmost corner to the endless beaches of Latvia.

programme.title: Meerkat Manor: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In the series finale, it's all out war at the Commandos when dominant male Zorro goes missing in action.

programme.title: Wildest Places: Antarctic
programme.desc: Wildest Places explores some of the most incredible natural habitats on earth & a diverse range of wildlife.

programme.title: Human Prey: Killers of the Savannah
programme.desc: Focused on helping a pregnant, wounded lioness, an unarmed South African conservationist unwittingly ends up face-to-face with one of the pride's aggressive, young males. During his Zambezi River adventure, a pilot is attacked by a hungry hyena.

programme.title: Jungle Planet
programme.desc: In the northern hemisphere, forests are adapted to the extreme seasonality of very cold winters and hot, humid summers.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bait and Switch
programme.desc: Things are seldom what they seem in the world of bounty hunting. When the fugitive's girlfriend offers to help Dog trap this dangerous felon, Dog knows that someone is being deceived. The only question is, whom?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: True Identity
programme.desc: Dog knows that looks can be deceiving. The fugitive is pretty, petite, and trouble. She stands accused of settling an argument with the help of a box cutter. What Dog does not anticipate is how deceptive this femme fatale can truly be!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: What do you do when you have a fugitive you not only want to find, but believe can be helped back onto the straight and narrow? If you're Mary Ellen you call your good friend Dog.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Match Point
programme.desc: Duty calls and the Chapmans are off on a hunt. The team chases a fugitive who has disappeared into a world of "no known addresses."

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Menehune Mischief
programme.desc: When Beth returns to the compound on the Big Island she finds a damaged SUV and two possible culprits - Dog or Justin. Pressed by Beth, Dog offers a third option. The perpetrators are Hawaii's mythical mischief makers - the Menehune!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Mister Mom
programme.desc: It's been quite a while since Tim Chapman put down his mace can and bulletproof vest to care for his growing family. When his old friend Dog calls asking for help tracking an elusive felon, Tim jumps into action.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bait & Snitch
programme.desc: With the aid of the runner's girlfriend the posse heads out to bring a client with a checked past in. Little does the team suspect that before the end of the day Dog will be helping to mend a family torn apart by violence.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Scared Straight
programme.desc: Dog tracks a fugitive who is on the run from the law for the first time. Reading the file Dog knows the young man's life is at the crossroads. Will he be able to track down this wanna-be-gangsta in time to convince him to make the right choice?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: All My Children
programme.desc: For a guy who started life as a free spirited outlaw-biker Dog has certainly turned into a family man. His children touch everything he does today, from searching for the perfect gift for his daughter Cecily's birthday to hunting a fugitive.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Can't Hardly Weight
programme.desc: Gearing up for his high school reunion, Willie realizes that he could stand to lose a few pounds. Jase and Korie set out to help him drop some weight and the strenuous battle of man-versus-waistline begins.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Shot Thru The Heart
programme.desc: The guys learn from Willie that John Luke is going through his first break up. In order to make him feel better the men decide to take John Luke hunting for nutria, and impart their relationship wisdom.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Here Lizard, Lizard
programme.desc: When the warehouse guys new office pet (a lizard) escapes, they try all they can in order to catch the wily reptile. Proving impossible, the guys finally decide to bring in the big guns to help trap it--Mr. Phil Robertson.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Hallu-Si-Nations
programme.desc: With Willie out-of-town, the guys decide to flake off work and leave to brush up the duck blinds on the Robertson land. While out, Si believes he spots what he thinks is the infamous 'Black Panther'.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Let's Go Hunting, Deer
programme.desc: Willie and Jase invite Korie and Missy along on a deer hunt because they believe their wives have become too "city." At Phil and Kay's, Miss Kay decides she wants to frame Phil's original blueprints from the first duck call he created.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Tickets To The Fun Show
programme.desc: During Duck Commander's "Casino Night" party, Si Robertson wins the grand prize of $2000 and decides to buy a massage chair for the duck call room. The massage chair becomes a detriment to the workflow, so Willie takes Si around for a replacement prize.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck Be a Lady
programme.desc: Sadie, has a homecoming dance coming up, but Willie doesn't approve of her dress selection. Willie decides to take Sadie out to find her a new "appropriate" dress.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Ring Around the Redneck
programme.desc: Though Jase lost his wedding ring long ago, Missy decides it's time for Jase to replace it with a new one. When Jase is duck hunting, once again, he loses the ring.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Bass Man Standing
programme.desc: The Duck Commander team is invited to unveil a wing of the local Bass Pro shop that will feature their products.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Battle of the Brothers
programme.desc: Willie's suspicious behavior from dyeing his beard to buying a new motorcycle, makes Jase come to the conclusion that Willie is having a mid-life crisis.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Aloha, Robertsons!
programme.desc: After all their hard work, Willie decides to take the entire Robertson clan on a family vacation to Hawaii. But Willie's daily itinerary for the trip gets constantly undermined by the family's desire to participate in their own island activities.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Rock Stars and Rampies
programme.desc: Facing Joe's wrath, Rod and Cory head to the UK to make urgent water bomber repairs. David tries to prove himself to Devan in the C-46 but ends up infuriating Devan. Will makes an ultimatum in Hay River.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Peter in a Pickle
programme.desc: Peter goes to Scotland and discovers that his boss Bryan Sr. has followed, Beat and André face a client with buyer’s remorse, while Joel agrees to build an elaborate doghouse and birdhouse, all for a slice of cake.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Wilderness Retreat
programme.desc: Joel builds an enormous house in the wilderness for a millionaire client he’s never met, Bryan Sr. promises to make log furniture and Beat must deliver, while Peter plays the role of a lifetime.

programme.title: Timber Kings: German Efficiency
programme.desc: Beat’s schedule is thrown by German customs and there’s only one way to catch up, Bryan Sr. takes Peter to the wilderness and they harvest 200-foot trees.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Arkansas Shuffle
programme.desc: Beat sets logs in the pouring Arkansas rain for a client who orders renovations on the fly, a Catholic priest convinces Bryan Sr. and Peter to build a wedding gazebo for free.

programme.title: Timber Kings: The Boss Can Build
programme.desc: André the GM and master salesman must go to Ontario and lead his first build in more than 10 years, Beat has to collaborate in carving a hairy friend.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 9
programme.desc: We have always been told that mankind enjoys free will. Is this really true or have aliens created the means for controlling humanity?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: As the world continues to evolve into the digital age, people are capturing images in the sky that they are unable to explain.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: While many UFO sightings occur in rural locations with only a single eyewitness, there have been sightings over cities witnessed by hundreds.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 8
programme.desc: Take a fresh look at some classic alien encounters, UFOs and abductions, and discover several new stories.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Explore the travel challenges that alien spaceships face, and discover whether humans can tackle interstellar flight.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: As humanity continues to search for alien life, experts give their analysis on how close we are to first contact.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Examine the possible components of aliens' protective second layer of skin.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: With light from distant stars taking millions of years to reach us, how long might it take for alien life to answer any communication sent into space?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Antigravity: Experts discuss the possibility of advanced alien technology that could allow UFOs to fly at blinding speed or hover effortlessly a few feet above the ground.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: In 1947, there was an unprecedented wave of UFO sightings that propelled the UFO phenomenon to the world stage. What were the US Air Force's findings?

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party
programme.desc: In 1924, Hitler is convicted for High Treason after the failed Nazi power grab. In prison, he writes Mein Kampf, articulating his anti-Semitic and expansionist beliefs. Upon release, Hitler rebrands the Nazi Party.

programme.title: War Story: Out of the Clouds: Paras in Normandy
programme.desc: In Normandy, the 1st Canadian Parachute Battalion proved itself to be in the vanguard of the best-trained and toughest units in the Allied forces.

programme.title: War Story: Across the Rhine: Paras in Germany
programme.desc: In mid-September 1944, the remnants of the battered 1st Canadian Parachute Battalion participated in the largest parachute drop in history, fought a successful battle.

programme.title: War Story: Vengeance
programme.desc: In 1941, nearly 30,000 Jews escaped the ghettos and work camps and they joined the growing underground resistance army, actively fighting the Nazis.

programme.title: War Story: Prisoners of the Sun
programme.desc: On 16 November 1941, two Canadian battalions arrived in the British colony of Hong Kong. Their aim: Bolster the Empire’s defenses in the event of aggression by the restless forces of Japan, stationed only kilometres away in occupied China.

programme.title: War Story: The Last Ship: The Sinking of the Esquimalt
programme.desc: On 16 April 1945, a mere three weeks before German surrender, the submarine fired a single torpedo that sank the last Canadian naval vessel lost to enemy action.

programme.title: War Story: Buchenwald Airmen
programme.desc: For two months in 1944, 168 Allied airmen were shot down over occupied France, betrayed to the Gestapo by the same collaborator, transported to the Nazi concentration and slave labour camp Buchenwald.

programme.title: War Story
programme.desc: In the longest campaign of the Second World War, from 1939 to 1945, German submarines desperately try to sever Britain’s shipping lifeline across the Atlantic Ocean. Canada plays the central role in the campaign.

programme.title: Secret War: The Spymistress and the French Fiasco
programme.desc: After WWII, SOE disbanded, leaving Vera Atkins to uncover fates of 118 agents, including 13 women. Many were betrayed and sent to camps; some were executed. Atkins' quest continued, marked by personal impact and delayed recognition.

programme.title: Combat Trains
programme.desc: The story of the trench warfare from the First World War is well known. What is less well known is that the efficiency of the railway networks of both sides helped cause that stalemate.

programme.title: U-Boat Wargamers: Stalemate
programme.desc: Karl Dönitz fills the ocean with wolfpacks. It's 1943, and with supplies spread thin, pressure mounts on Roberts and the Wrens as they fight to prove the their tactics.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: The Ambush
programme.desc: Examining how the techniques of ambush, along with weapons that remained undetected until the very moment they were used, would revolutionise warfare.

programme.title: Shadow Man
programme.desc: The dramatic true story of the most elaborate espionage operation ever mounted by one country against an ally, as Winston Churchill launches a plan to undermine pro-Nazi sympathisers.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Endgame
programme.desc: With only three days left in the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season, the captains of Gloucester race against each other - and an oncoming storm - in the battle to land their final fish of the season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Wicked Return
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, set out for Jeffrey's Ledge in hopes of catching the first fish of the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna Season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Checkmate
programme.desc: It's week two of the North Atlantic Blue Fin Tuna Season and the Gloucester captains and their crews, from rookies to old pros, get put to the test.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Into The Storm
programme.desc: Bad weather threatens to end the fishing week for the Gloucester fishermen, but while some boats head for home, others decide to take on Mother Nature's wrath.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Operation T.U.N.A
programme.desc: As the hunt for blue fin tuna intensifies, the fisherman resort to espionage for information.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 6
programme.desc: Paramedic Mark Hayes responds to a stabbing and has to rescue a woman from a car crash who's on her way to her critically ill baby. The Emergency Bikers go head to head in a battle of biking skill.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 7

programme.title: Ancient Alien Question

programme.title: UFO Hunters
programme.desc: On January 28, 1994, an Air France pilot, his crew and passengers witnessed a brightly-glowing red and brown disc-shaped object while flying to London.

programme.title: UFO Hunters
programme.desc: There's a growing phenomenon of alleged UFO sightings known as Orbs. Witnesses who see the Orbs also report having dreams, premonitions, and a deep fear.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Three rare Alvises get the auction buyers going when put under the hammer. A Chevy Corvette which started its journey in Saudi Arabia makes its way to Thornton-le-Dale for the sale.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave gets a nasty surprise when he opens the bonnet of a fast Ford from the 80s, and an Austin Heavy 12 nearly a century old sets off a bidding war at the auction.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek, with help from the Mathewson clan, drag a mini pickup out of the barn where it's been for 20 years, and a 350cc Douglas Mark V motorbike from 1950 goes under the hammer.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Legendary film sets with surprising pasts and real locations that inspired Hollywood. Within these decaying structures are the echoes of history.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: In North Wales a secret facility which once manufactured mustard gas and enriched uranium lies in ruins. In Malta is a luxurious quarantine facility, that hides a dark secret.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance

programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service treats a man who stabbed a police dog, a woman with a suspected stroke and a man on his fourth bout of pneumonia.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance

programme.title: Arthur: My Club Rules/Stolen Bike

programme.title: Arthur: The Chronicles of Buster/On this Spot
programme.desc: Buster learns that special effects can't take the place of hard work when conquering real mountains. Arthur is thrilled to find out that Sitting Bull once passed through town! He rallies the residents to mark the spot with a monument.

programme.title: Arthur: Buster Spaces Out/The Long Road Home
programme.desc: Inspired by footage of the moon landing, Buster wants to go to outer space someday! For now, it'd be cool to build and launch a rocket! Then, after costing Lakewood Elementary the win in a relay race, George wants to redeem himself.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Family Vacation/Grandpa Dave's Old Country Farm
programme.desc: What's got moldy bathrooms, lumpy beds and lots of rain? Arthur's family vacation. Then, Arthur and D.W. go to visit their grandfather, but the visit doesn't turn out as expected, because Grandpa Dave isn't your usual kind of grandfather.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's First Sleepover/Arthur's New Year's Eve
programme.desc: Have you ever been afraid of the dark? Despite D.W.'s threat of aliens, Arthur sets his tent for his first sleepover. Then, what exactly happens at midnight, December 31st? There are plenty of rumors, but no one seems to know for sure.

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Barnes, Wingman/To Beat Or Not To Beat
programme.desc: Does Binky have a favorite pastime? Not until citywide Bug Week, when suddenly all he can think about is butterflies. Then, there's a horrible racket in Elwood City, and it's Francine practicing her singing and drumming for the Talent Show!

programme.title: Arthur: My Music Rules/That's A Baby Show!
programme.desc: It's the duel of the century as cellist Yo-Yo Ma faces jazz saxophonist Joshua Redman in the toughest gig of their careers at the Elwood City Library! Then, will Arthur be exposed as a baby show lover?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Sells Out/Mind Your Manners
programme.desc: To earn the money for a new video game, Arthur decides to sell his old toys through his school's Web site. The Tibble Twins want to take Grandmother out to dinner, but she'd rather stay home. Is it because of their terrible table manners?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur The Wrecker/Arthur and The True Francine
programme.desc: Arthur always seems to wreck things, and this time it's Mom's computer. Can he get it fixed before Mom finds out? Then, Muffy A. Crosswire and Francine are absolute best friends, despite their rather obvious differences.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Camera Bugged
programme.desc: The polarisoid, an alien tourist visiting Earth, causes all sorts of commotion with his camera which sucks everything it photos literally inside the camera, including City Hall.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Green with Jealousy
programme.desc: In order to steal nuclear energy from a submarine, Krang creates a love potion which induces lovesickness in all of the Turtles - except Donatello, who does not eat the potion-laced pizza.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Return of the Fly
programme.desc: Intent on revenge against both the Turtles, Krang and Shredder, the Fly (alias Baxter Stockman) returns with a bug of a plan. While the Turtles are battling Shredder, the insect tries to exterminate the entire group!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Mutagen Monster
programme.desc: The chemicals from two carriages in a train wreck unite to form a mutagen, and steers licking up the goo are transformed into a bull-headed monster.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Corporate Raiders From Dimension X
programme.desc: Shredder utilizes a hypnotizing device and creates zombies out of CEOs all over the city. Ultimately, the plan is to raise the Technodrome from the centre of the Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Pizza By The Shred
programme.desc: In order to locate the Turtles' lair and destroy them, Shredder opens a pizza parlour. When the Turtles order a pizza, Shredder places a locator-tracking device on it disguised as an anchovy.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Super Bebop & Mighty Rocksteady
programme.desc: Krang creates Cybernetic Clones of Rocksteady, only ten times as strong and ten times as smart.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Blast From the Past
programme.desc: Shredder endeavours to enlist the aid of the ghost of Shibano-Sama, a noble warrior who lived hundreds of years ago, to destroy the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leatherhead: Terror of the Swamp
programme.desc: The Turtles go south to the swamps when their friends the Frogs -and Napoleon Bonafrog - are in trouble. The source of their predicament is Leatherhead, a half-human, half-alligator mutation.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo's Birthday
programme.desc: It's Michelangelo's birthday - and his good buddies are pretending they're unaware of it.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Ash has finally reached the Azalea Gym, but Cyndaquil isn’t quite fired up enough to take on the Gym Leader. As the battle heats up, Ash has to give his all to take on the powerful Bug-type Pokémon!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: An inexperienced young Trainer has managed to scare off his own Farfetch’d. Our heroes are happy to help him out, but they'll have to find it before Team Rocket does!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: An unexpected Pokémon firefighting competition reunites our heroes with some old friends, the Squirtle Squad! But they are in desperate need of some leadership, so Ash and Squirtle rejoin the ranks.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: When they stumble upon a preschool for Wooper and an emergency calls the teacher away, our heroes come to the rescue! But, as always, Team Rocket is around the corner and up to no good…

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Following a string of mysterious thefts, our heroes discover some Houndour struggling to survive in the wild. To help these thieving Pokémon mend their ways, Ash and friends will first have to earn their trust.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Ash and Misty’s rivalry is reignited when they both try to capture a Totodile at the same time. Unable to see whose Poké Ball actually caught it, they decide a battle is the best way to decide Totodile’s new Trainer.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: When Ash hears of a virtually unbeatable Trainer nearby, he's itching to take on the challenge. But both Brock’s Vulpix and Ash’s Cyndaquil take a beating from her Skarmory, even with their type advantage! How can Ash defeat it?

programme.desc: A young couple from Belfast get more customers than they bargained for in Spain. The opening of a restaurant in France is in serious jeopardy, and renovations in a British-run restaurant in Mallorca prove more difficult than the owners ever thought.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: The Norfolk owners of a French hotel must call for reinforcements. In Mallorca, after a few exhausting weeks, a family from the Northeast finally opens their restaurant, and it’s crunch time for bar owners on the Costa del Sol when their chef quits.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A couple leaves Wales to try their luck running a bar in southern Spain, a couple of newlyweds swap Jersey for France, and two British hoteliers from Norfolk hand their livelihood over to their best friends as they take a well-deserved holiday.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario's Magic Carpet

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Hooded Robin and his Mario Men

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Brooklyn Bound

programme.title: Mega Disaster
programme.desc: Volcanoes can bury entire cities in clouds of ash and gas, or turn rivers into torrents of mud and debris.

programme.title: Mega Disaster
programme.desc: There is no stopping these massive and deadly phenomena, the only thing to do is run to higher ground.

programme.title: Mega Disaster
programme.desc: From the tremendous, to the terrifying, to the tragic, this is a countdown to a mega tornado.

programme.title: Rogue Earth

programme.title: Lake Geneva: The Giant Tsunami
programme.desc: In 563 AD, Geneva was destroyed by a tsunami, and it could happen again. Scientists are working to assess the danger and prepare for disaster.

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 140
programme.desc: Can you mail a coconut without packaging? Can you make a candle out of earwax? Can you make someone urinate involuntarily by putting their hand in a bowl of warm water while they sleep?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 225
programme.desc: When two cars try to knock each other off the road, does it always result in a difficult duel? Is the silver screen trick of tipping up on to two wheels and driving sideways as easy as it seems?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 154
programme.desc: Does pepper spray, a flannel shirt and a stun gun cause a massive fireball? Can fireworks really launch a person over a lake?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 158
programme.desc: Did the Greeks create an arrow machine gun that offered the speed, distance and precision that modern machine guns do? Is driving while tired worse than driving while tipsy?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 226
programme.desc: Can you bob for an apple during a 100-foot bungee jump? Can you really play tennis on an airplane wing mid-flight?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 144
programme.desc: Can you skip a car over a lake? Is a toilet seat cleaner than other household items?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Failed Five Times?
programme.desc: Michelle's current boyfriend Everett can't run from Robert's allegations about his daughter. Will Everett's lie detector test results prove his innocence?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Leave My Kids to Die?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve, I Can't Face The Truth.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Punch a Woman like I Punch a Man

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Crawl to Your Wife
programme.desc: After surviving a wild car chase, losing her leg, and being comatose due to her husband, Portia will finally confront him. He won't admit fault, but today Steve’s helping Portia find her voice.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Ever Have My Baby?
programme.desc: Since he never saw evidence of her pregnancy, Robert is here to find out if his ex-girlfriend Sara was ever pregnant with their child. What will his lie detector results reveal?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: All 15 chefs walk into a dining room filled with Marines, where they find out they will have to cook dishes that represent the air, land and sea. Things take a drastic turn when one chef accuses Chef Ramsay of sabotaging her.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Teams are tasked with cooking halibut in seven different ways; a dinner service; an elimination; pianist Stephan Moccio; chef David LeFevre.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Nothing But Net
programme.desc: Ton and Allen face their toughest challenge yet when two old rivals join forces. The guys dig up an off-road motorcycle and a pair of net guns, while the staff clashes with mystery shoppers back at Haff Ton Pawn.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fire in the Hole!
programme.desc: 1930s "blasting machine" dynamite detonator box; 1890s treasure chest with secret compartments. Ton smelts jewelry to forge bricks of silver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Cold Hard Cash
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go North to Alaska and get a cold reception from the local auctioneer. They find two enormous seaplane pontoons and a pair of Smith & Wesson revolvers, including the most powerful production handgun in the world!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Bowling Pin Payday
programme.desc: Allen & Ton visit Ton's old stompin' ground and go head-to-head with a trash-talking auction buyer. They uncover a 19th century rifle with a matching cutlass bayonet and a mechanical bowling pinsetter from the early 1960's!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Wild West
programme.desc: Allen and Ton explain their strategies at a storage auction in San Bernardino, win two units, then have a Pepperbox gun and vintage Lionel train set appraised by experts.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ramped Up
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go head-to-head with their former assistant, Carolyn, while Ton battles a bad back. The guys discover an automatic BB gun and, when negotiations to sell a stunt ramp go south, Allen faces a tough decision.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sin City Shootout
programme.desc: 1953 Chevy-inspired bumper car; scores of M16 30-round magazines; reproduction 1940s boardwalk photobooth; aerosol-powered spud gun potato launchers.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Wreck-Shaw
programme.desc: Allen drags a starving Ton to a weekend auction and some newbie buyers try to eat up all the profit. Will a rickshaw, a wrecking ball, and blast detonators be enough to satisfy Ton's appetite, or will the guys go home hungry?

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ice, Ice, Baby
programme.desc: Ton and Allen have to get aggressive when they encounter a towering opponent with a mountain of cash. The guys uncover a vintage ice resurfacing machine and an Olympic biathlon rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Everything's Bigger in Texas
programme.desc: Winchester 1886 rifle invented to kill buffalo; collection of 1950s electric Slot Cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Early Bird Special
programme.desc: Vintage Shooting Star carnival game; professional Mixed Martial Arts octagon fighting cage.
